svg.title: Admin user interaction diagram
svg.desc: Step-by-step interaction flow for an admin on Shasnadesh: login, dashboard, create/edit blogs, manage, analytics, and logout.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the admin login page look like in Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('How does Shasnadesh authenticate admin login?')
sendPrompt('What happens when admin login fails?')
sendPrompt('How is the JWT token stored after admin login?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What navigation options does the admin sidebar have?')
sendPrompt('What can an admin do on the Manage Blogs page?')
sendPrompt('What does the BlogEditor allow an admin to do?')
sendPrompt('What charts are shown on the Analytics page?')
sendPrompt('What are the per-blog actions in ManageBlogs?')
sendPrompt('What can an admin do inside the RichEditor?')
sendPrompt('How does image upload work in the blog editor?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an admin saves or publishes a blog?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a blog is saved as draft?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a blog is published in Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the admin logs out of Shasnadesh?')
